message:
Add debug tracing infrastructure for AWS SDK hang investigation

- Add extensive __EDGEBOX_TRACE() markers via sed injection throughout
  bundle.js during build to track execution flow
- Trace module initialization chain: J2 -> Uj1 -> LWQ -> mEA -> FEA -> LC -> q6A -> X2 -> g3
- Identified hang occurs after qJ() wrapper returns in X2 module
- Added zlib constants to node_polyfill.js
- Debug infrastructure helps narrow down execution stop point in
  300K+ line minified bundle
